title: Heart Crystals
description: increase your hearts perminently with heart crystals found underground
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rosevcook/heart_crystals/main/src/main/resources/logo.png)

📖 About:

  • Heart Crystals is a Terraria-inspired mod that adds rare heart-shaped crystals underground for you to discover. Using these crystals will permanently grant you an extra heart.
  • You’ll start a new world with 5 hearts and can work your way up to a maximum of 20 hearts. Both values are fully configurable.
  • Heart Crystals can also be crafted into various items, such as Heart Lanterns, Cupid’s Arrows, Regeneration Potions, and can be used as a Trim Material.

📖 Cross Content:

  • Caverns & Chasms - Heart Lantern Recipe will include Silver Ingots, New Alternate Recipe for Living Flesh using Heart Crystal Shards
  • Gallery - Item Texture for Heartbeat Painting
